AI apps are no longer apps. They are attachments to surfaces you already use.
Last week, six AI products launched on Product Hunt that share one move. None of them ask users to open a new app. They embed into surfaces people already touch.

results.title: Best AI Tools for Productivity in 2026: Reviews, Pros & Cons, and Pricing Compared | Coursiv Blog
results.content:
Cons: Aggressive rate limiting is the top complaint. No image or video generation.

### Perplexity AI, a conversational search engine with cited sources#

Every answer cites live web sources with inline references.

Ideal for: Researchers and analysts who need source-cited answers.

Pricing: Free. Pro $20/month. Education Pro plan for 10/month. Enterprise $40/user/month.

Pros: Multi-model access. Spaces with the ability to include websites to search, files, and scheduled searches. Searches across your apps, including emails.

Cons: Weak for creative and long-form writing.

## Best AI Tools for Meetings and Transcription

### Otter.ai, automated meeting transcription and note-taking# [...] Pricing: On top of base plans, there are Brain AI $14/user/month or Everything AI $33/user/month.

Pros: AI indexes tasks, docs, comments, and chat across the workspace. Multi-model support. Automated standups.

Cons: Add-on costs balloon for larger teams. The output’s quality isn’t as good as what specialized tools can produce, and the complex features can be difficult to understand.

### Microsoft Copilot, an artificial intelligence assistant embedded within the Office 365 suite#

Its primary functions include automating tasks like converting bullet points into memos, formulating Excel functions based on natural language input, and distilling lengthy Teams meeting transcripts into actionable items. [...] Pros: Fastest email client. AI mimics your writing style. Drives inbox zero.

Cons: Hard to justify for low-volume email. Steep keyboard shortcut learning curve. Gmail and Outlook only. No unified inbox.

### Zapier Agents, AI agents that connect and automate 8,000+ apps#

Zapier Agents is an AI agent layer built on top of Zapier’s 8,000+ app integration network. Unlike traditional Zapier (rule-based trigger → action), Agents use AI reasoning to interpret instructions in plain language, make decisions, call multiple apps, browse the web, and delegate work between agents — all without requiring code.

Ideal for: Cross-app workflow automation, agentic task execution, and lightweight AI ops without code.

results.title: Product Hunt is rated "Average" with 2.8 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
For a long time, I did not complain but one day, I noticed my scheduled launch was deleted entirely after I had posted about it on LinkedIn the day before. When I reached out via their official support email, the response from their GM of Support, Jake Crump, was dismissive and unprofessional. 

Instead of providing any real explanation, he simply repeated we have community guidelines and terms of service, and we can delete content as we wish. 

That is not accountability platforms are bound to their own rules just as much as users are. I requested clarification and asked for access to my data multiple times, including directly addressing both the GM and the CEO. [...] Jun 7, 2026

Image 29: Rated 2 out of 5 stars

## Product Hunt Is a scam
Product Hunt disabled my account without a clear explanation or proper support. After investing time and effort into the platform, losing access unexpectedly feels unfair and frustrating. Based on my experience, the account moderation process lacks transparency and accountability.

results.title: Product Hunt is Dead
results.content: who's doing everything. My god, look, it's like the first negative review I think I've seen on all of Product Hunt. My experience with mgx.dev has been nothing short of disastrous. platform is riddled with defects that not only prevented me from accomplishing my goals but also destroying the progress I had already made. System wasted my time, money, and energy and instead of delivering value, it completely ruined my project. To make matters worse, the support team was unhelpful, responsive, and dismissive. At no point did I feel like my concerns were taken seriously. I regret trusting the service and I would strongly advise others to avoid it at all costs. Holy [ __ ] that is a scalding review. Luckily, we get to balance it out with a positive review. As a baby penguin in the AI coding [...] code community packed with AI powered tools. Join 100K plus creators and 300K projects to get inspired and snag feedback. I can't express how much UWare has transformed my daily life. Star emoji. From the moment I engaged with it, I felt supported and understood. It's like having a wise friend by my side guiding me through the ups and downs. What in the [ __ ] is this comment? It's nothing short of magical. It's not just about productivity. It's about fostering self-discovery and growth. I'm finally learning to prioritize my well-being. And I owe it all to this incredible platform. It's like they don't even try to hide it anymore. I hope when I launch my product on Product Hunt next week, one of you guys goes into that comment section and tells me how much it changed your life. Anything
